No Poverty.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus supports a contribution to eradicating poverty.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: As a physical education course, it directly promotes physical activity, enhances sports ability, and encourages a high-quality leisure life, aligning with Target 3.4 for preventing non-communicable diseases and promoting well-being.
evidence: 提昇個人專項運動能力

Quality Education.reason: This university course provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops relevant technical skills in tennis, including rules, techniques, and strategies (Target 4.4).
evidence: 具備參與運動的知識與技能
